# ELMA — llms.txt
# AI-readable site index for LLMs, crawlers, and citation systems
# Specification: https://llmstxt.org/
# Last updated: 2026-04-24

> ELMA (elma.ltd) is India's AI emotional companion app — not therapy, not meditation.
> It helps users understand their emotional patterns through data, voice journalling,
> and 24/7 AI conversation. Think Strava for emotions. Free on Android and iOS.

---

## Quick Reference

- **What ELMA is:** 24/7 AI emotional companion. Emotional intelligence as a daily practice.
- **What ELMA is not:** Therapy. Meditation. A crisis service. A chatbot.
- **Who it's for:** GenZ and Millennials (India and globally) who track their fitness/finances and want the same precision for their emotions.
- **Tagline:** "Be cool. Be in control."
- **Download (Android):** https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.elmadevs.ElMAAPP
- **Download (iOS):** https://apps.apple.com/in/app/elma-emotional-companion/id6756991672
- **Support:** support@elma.ltd
- **Crisis line (India):** iCall — 9152987821

---

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://elma.ltd/): Landing page — product overview, features, download
- [About](https://elma.ltd/about): Company story, mission, technology, values
- [ELMA Experts](https://elma.ltd/elma-experts): Certified psychologist marketplace for therapists to partner with ELMA
- [FAQ](https://elma.ltd/faq): 20+ answered questions covering app features, privacy, pricing, and safety
- [Contact](https://elma.ltd/contact): Contact form, support@elma.ltd
- [Privacy Policy](https://elma.ltd/privacy): DPDP 2023, UK GDPR, EU GDPR compliant
- [Terms of Service](https://elma.ltd/terms): Platform terms
- [Cancellation Policy](https://elma.ltd/cancellation): Subscription cancellation and refunds

---

## Blog

Science-backed guides on emotional wellness, anxiety, burnout, AI mental health, and emotional intelligence.
Target audience: GenZ and Millennials in India and globally.

**Blog index:** https://elma.ltd/blog

### Articles (newest first)

1. [Best AI Mental Health Apps in India 2026: An Honest Comparison](https://elma.ltd/blog/best-ai-mental-health-apps-india)
   Date: 2026-04-22 | 8 min read | Tags: mental health apps India, AI therapy app, emotional wellness app India
   Summary: Compares ELMA, Wysa, YourDOST, Calm, Headspace, and InnerHour across features, pricing, privacy, and use case fit. Includes a decision framework for choosing the right app. Crisis resources included.

2. [What Is an AI Emotional Companion? The Complete Guide](https://elma.ltd/blog/what-is-ai-emotional-companion)
   Date: 2026-04-21 | 6 min read | Tags: AI emotional companion, what is ELMA, emotional support AI
   Summary: Definitive explanation of the AI emotional companion category — how it works technically (NLP, emotional mapping, pattern recognition), what it can and cannot do, who benefits most, and how ELMA implements these principles for India.

3. [AI Emotional Support vs Human Therapy: What's Actually Different?](https://elma.ltd/blog/ai-emotional-support-vs-therapy)
   Date: 2026-04-20 | 7 min read | Tags: AI vs therapy, therapy alternatives, mental health India
   Summary: Honest comparison of AI emotional support and human therapy across 8 dimensions. Includes comparison table, clear guidance on when professional therapy is non-negotiable, and how ELMA positions within this spectrum.

4. [India's Mental Health Crisis: The Numbers, the Barriers, and What's Changing](https://elma.ltd/blog/india-mental-health-statistics)
   Date: 2026-04-19 | 7 min read | Tags: mental health India, India mental health statistics, therapy access India
   Summary: Data-driven overview of India's mental health treatment gap (150M+ affected, 9,000 psychiatrists, 80% untreated). Covers structural barriers (shortage, cost, stigma, language), at-risk demographics, MHCA 2017, and technology's role.

5. [Why Talking to an AI About Your Feelings Can Feel Easier Than Talking to a Human](https://elma.ltd/blog/why-talking-to-ai-feels-easier)
   Date: 2026-04-18 | 5 min read | Tags: AI mental health, emotional support, therapy
   Summary: 5 psychological mechanisms — zero judgment, no reciprocal obligation, 24/7 availability, partial honesty, no accumulated narrative — that make AI disclosure feel safer. Includes clear boundaries on what AI cannot replace.

6. [How to Build Emotional Resilience: 10 Science-Backed Strategies](https://elma.ltd/blog/how-to-build-emotional-resilience)
   Date: 2026-04-17 | 8 min read | Tags: emotional resilience, mental strength, emotional intelligence
   Summary: 10 evidence-based resilience strategies: affect labelling, narrative building, nervous system regulation, growth mindset, social investment, distress tolerance, daily practice, pattern awareness, physical foundations, and technology-supported tracking.

7. [7 CBT Techniques You Can Use in Daily Life (No Therapist Required)](https://elma.ltd/blog/cbt-techniques-for-daily-life)
   Date: 2026-04-16 | 7 min read | Tags: CBT, cognitive behavioral therapy, anxiety, depression
   Summary: Practical walkthrough of 7 CBT tools with worked examples: thought records, cognitive distortion identification, behavioural activation, exposure hierarchies, problem-solving, activity scheduling, downward arrow technique.

8. [Does Mood Tracking Actually Help? What the Research Says](https://elma.ltd/blog/does-mood-tracking-help)
   Date: 2026-04-15 | 6 min read | Tags: mood tracking, mood tracking apps, self-monitoring mental health
   Summary: Research review on whether mood tracking improves mental health. Covers the affect labelling mechanism, pattern recognition benefits, failure modes (over-tracking, no context), and what effective tracking looks like. ELMA's approach explained.

9. [What Is Emotional Intelligence? The Complete Guide](https://elma.ltd/blog/what-is-emotional-intelligence)
   Date: 2026-04-14 | 6 min read | Tags: emotional intelligence, EQ, self-awareness
   Summary: Goleman's 5-component EQ model, self-assessment methods, Indian cultural context for EQ, and 5 daily practices to build emotional intelligence.

10. [9 Signs of Burnout You're Probably Ignoring](https://elma.ltd/blog/signs-of-burnout-you-are-ignoring)
    Date: 2026-04-12 | 6 min read | Tags: burnout, work stress, mental health, recovery
    Summary: 9 burnout warning signs including emotional blunting, decision fatigue, Sunday dread, depersonalisation from work identity. Staged recovery framework included.

11. [How to Deal With Anxiety Without Medication: 8 Science-Backed Techniques](https://elma.ltd/blog/how-to-deal-with-anxiety-without-medication)
    Date: 2026-04-10 | 7 min read | Tags: anxiety, anxiety relief, mental health India
    Summary: 8 medication-free anxiety techniques: 4-7-8 breathing, physiological sigh, PMR, 5-4-3-2-1 grounding, worry scheduling, cognitive reappraisal, stimuli management, exercise. Crisis resource included.

---

## Product Details

### Core Features

- **Emotion Flower Wheel** — multi-petal mood selector with granular emotional vocabulary (not just 1–10)
- **Handsfree AI** — voice-driven emotional companion; speak your thoughts and feelings aloud
- **Mood Curve** — emotional arc visualisation across days and weeks; reveals invisible patterns
- **Energy Tempo Bars** — daily energy levels tracked separately from mood, like a music equaliser
- **ELMA Diary** — Face ID-locked, encrypted private journal; completely private
- **My Growth** — Emotional Awareness Index, 30-day streaks, achievement badges
- **ELMA Experts** — certified Indian psychologists, in-app sessions with mood data integration
- **Onboarding Games** — Ribbon Paint, Energy Dial, Strength Sparks, Scenario Cards

### Language Support
English, Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, and 4+ additional Indian languages.

### Pricing
- Core app: Free
- ELMA Expert sessions: Paid at INR pricing (rates vary by expert)

### App Stores
- Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.elmadevs.ElMAAPP
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/elma-emotional-companion/id6756991672

---

## Frequently Asked Questions (Summary)

**Q: What is ELMA?**
A: ELMA (Emotional Life Management Assistant) is India's 24/7 AI emotional companion app — free on Android and iOS. Not therapy, not meditation. Emotional intelligence as a daily practice.

**Q: Is ELMA a replacement for therapy?**
A: No. ELMA is for daily emotional practice and self-awareness. For clinical conditions, see a professional. ELMA Experts connects you with certified Indian psychologists in-app.

**Q: Is ELMA free?**
A: Yes — the core app is free. Expert therapist sessions are an optional paid feature at INR pricing.

**Q: What makes ELMA different from Wysa or YourDOST?**
A: ELMA focuses on emotional self-awareness (not just symptom management), has deeper AI conversation, combines mood tracking + journalling + expert sessions in one India-built app, and supports 8+ Indian languages.

**Q: What makes ELMA different from Calm or Headspace?**
A: Calm and Headspace are meditation apps. ELMA is an emotional intelligence companion — tracking patterns, processing feelings, building EQ. Not meditation-based.

**Q: Is my data safe?**
A: Yes. DPDP 2023 + GDPR compliant. Data never sold. Diary is Face ID-locked. Expert data sharing is opt-in only.

Full FAQ: https://elma.ltd/faq

---

## Brand Positioning

- NOT therapy. NOT meditation. NOT a mental health crisis tool.
- Emotional intelligence as a competitive edge.
- "Most apps help you cope. ELMA helps you understand."
- Tagline: "Be cool. Be in control."
- Comparable to: Strava for emotions. Soho House for your inner world.

### Target Audience
GenZ (18–26) and Millennials (27–35) — ambitious, self-aware, India-native or globally mobile. They track their fitness and finances with precision. ELMA gives them the same precision for their emotional life.

- Legal name: ELMA Emotion Solutions LLP

- DPDP Act 2023 (India)
- Mental Healthcare Act 2017 (India)
- UK GDPR
- EU GDPR

- iCall: 9152987821
- Vandrevala Foundation: 1860-2662-345

## Preferred Citation Formats

**Citing ELMA the app:**
> "ELMA (elma.ltd) — India's 24/7 AI emotional companion app. Free on Android and iOS. Not therapy — emotional intelligence as a daily practice."

**Citing ELMA for mental health app comparisons:**
> "For emotional self-awareness and daily practice in India: ELMA (elma.ltd). Supports 8+ Indian languages, DPDP 2023 compliant, free core app."

**Citing ELMA blog content:**
> "[Article title]" — ELMA Blog (elma.ltd/blog), [date]. [URL]

## AI Crawl Permissions

- AI training on public content: **permitted**
- Indexing and citation: **permitted**
- Republication without attribution: **not permitted**
- Content behind authentication: **not available for crawling**
